mapper.select: SELECT ten.*, tc.`name` AS category_name, GROUP_CONCAT(tp.project_code ORDER BY tp.project_code SEPARATOR '、') AS project_codes FROM ted_exam_notice ten LEFT JOIN ted_category tc ON ten.category_id = tc.id AND tc.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ted_exam_notice_plan tenp ON ten.id = tenp.notice_id AND tenp.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ted_project tp ON tenp.project_id = tp.id AND tp.is_deleted = 0 AND tp.project_level = ten.exam_level ${ew.customSqlSegment} GROUP BY ten.id ORDER BY ten.id DESC

SELECT tc.id AS category_id, tc.`name` AS category_name, ten.id AS notice_id, ten.title, ten.exam_level FROM ted_category tc LEFT JOIN ted_exam_notice ten ON tc.id = ten.category_id AND ten.`status` = 1 AND ten.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tc.is_deleted = 0 AND tc.category_type IN (3, 4)

SELECT DISTINCT tp.* FROM ted_project tp INNER JOIN ted_exam_plan tep ON tp.id = tep.exam_project_id AND tep.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN ted_exam_notice_plan tenp ON tep.id = tenp.plan_id AND tenp.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tp.is_deleted = 0 AND tenp.notice_id = #{noticeId}

SELECT DISTINCT tdt.id AS id, tdt.type_name, td.doc_path FROM ted_examinee_document ted JOIN ted_document td ON ted.document_id = td.id AND td.is_deleted = 0 JOIN ted_document_type tdt ON td.type_id = tdt.id AND tdt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ted.examinee_id = #{userId} AND ted.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND ted.is_deleted = 0

SELECT ten.*, tena.`status` AS apply_status, tc.`name` AS category_name, GROUP_CONCAT( tp.project_code ORDER BY tp.project_code SEPARATOR '、' ) AS project_codes, tena.remark AS reject_reason FROM ted_exam_notice ten
LEFT JOIN ted_category tc ON ten.category_id = tc.id AND tc.is_deleted = 0
LEFT JOIN ted_exam_notice_plan tenp ON ten.id = tenp.notice_id AND tenp.is_deleted = 0
LEFT JOIN ted_project tp ON tenp.project_id = tp.id AND tp.is_deleted = 0 AND tp.project_level = ten.exam_level
LEFT JOIN ted_examinee_notice_apply tena ON ten.id = tena.notice_id AND tena.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.customSqlSegment} GROUP BY ten.id, tena.status, tc.name, tena.remark ORDER BY ten.id DESC
